sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85802" key="po/rnotrif" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πόρνο-τριφ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῐβος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (τρίβὠ</foreign> <sense id="n85802.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πορνοκόπος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">389</biblScope></bibl>, Thom.Mag.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.291R.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
